package repository

import "context"

// DictionariesRepository is a draft repository boundary for dictionaries.
// Keep runtime implementations behind platform repository ports before copying this draft.
type DictionariesRepository interface {
	List(ctx context.Context, query DictionariesQuery) ([]Dictionary, error)
}

type DictionariesQuery struct {
	Keywords []string
	Page int
	PageSize int
}
